creator: wollman@khavrinen.lcs.mit.edu
text:
<<On Sun, 14 Mar 1999 20:38:24 +0100 (CET), des@flood.ping.uio.no said:

>> Fix:
	
> The solution is left as an exercise to the reader.

Replace the `100 *' in /etc/newsyslog.conf with `* @T04'.

-GAWollman
